adjustments, and regime multiplier.  Breakdown is stored as JSON column
and rendered in stock card UI under "View full breakdown".  Top 5 stocks
are logged for server-side observability.

Also includes backtest ablation engine for walk-forward weight
optimization and No-Trade Signal for unfavorable market regimes.

fix: normalize Cookie-Editor cookies for Playwright

Cookie-Editor exports sameSite as "no_restriction"/null/lowercase
and uses "expirationDate" instead of "expires". Playwright rejects
these values. The normalizer now handles all Cookie-Editor formats.

feat(skills): enforce thoroughness, anti-deferral, and atomic commits

- Add "Prime Directive" sections to both skills: thoroughness-over-speed
  for review, fix-don't-defer for resolve
- Require line-by-line reading of all code and full reading of every
  artifact (specs, ADRs, PRDs, stories, issues, comments, commits)
- Raise INVALID bar: must cite specific contradicting artifact section
- Gate INVALID auto-resolve on HIGH confidence only
- Add atomic commit strategy to resolve: one thread = one commit
- Add LEARN → DO reclassification check in review synthesis
- Add commit quality evaluation to review agents
- Bump version to 0.1.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ghost mode: preserve original material colors + increase contrast

- Stop overriding emissive color to white (was washing out all parts)
- Store original emissive, apply soft steel-blue glow only on highlight
- Increase highlight emissiveIntensity 0.10 → 0.25
- Lower ghost opacity 0.12 → 0.08 for better contrast
- Boost scene lighting for clearer visibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix query planner correctness bugs and add sort support

Correctness fixes:
- Unify IndexKey Integer/Float into single Number(f64) variant so that
  50 and 50.0 land in the same BTree bucket. Fixes index lookups and
  range queries silently missing documents when types differ.
- Switch Collection documents from HashMap to BTreeMap for deterministic
  iteration order, making skip/limit pagination stable.
- Add $or/$and index support: $or unions all branches (requires all
  indexable), $and intersects branches (partial coverage ok).
- Add field-level $not operator: {"age": {"$not": {"$gt": 30}}} now
  works (previously returned "unknown operator" error).

Performance fixes:
- Index lookup_eq now returns Option<&HashSet> instead of cloning.
- Index intersection sorts candidate sets by size (smallest first) and
  uses in-place retain instead of allocating new sets.
- Projection include mode uses HashSet<&str> instead of Vec for O(1)
  field membership checks.

New features:
- Sort support: {"sort": {"age": 1}} for ascending, -1 for descending.
  Multi-field sort supported. Sort is applied before skip/limit.
  Without sort, unsorted queries still use early termination on limit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Complete Phase 1 & 2 replication of MacDonald, Fagan & Geller (2016)

Phase 1: All 5 models (crime + arrest, 10 outcomes each) replicated
using fixest::fepois on raw incident-level data. Model 1 coefficients
match within 1-3% of published values across all 20 outcomes.

Phase 2: Permutation test (1,000 iterations) confirms true estimates
fall far outside placebo distribution (p<0.001 for both crime and
arrest). Detailed diagnostics logged in CHANGELOG.md.

commit.message:
feat(engine): hybrid search via gte-small + FTS5-OR + RRF (#35)

## Summary

- Add FTS5-OR query preprocessing (stop word removal + OR joins) raising
MRR from 0.506 → 0.808 with zero new dependencies
- Add semantic search infrastructure: embedder (gte-small), in-memory
embedding index (brute-force cosine similarity), and Reciprocal Rank
Fusion (RRF)
- Integrate hybrid search across full async call chain (interface →
sqlite → reader → server → CLI → TUI) with graceful degradation at every
failure point

Benchmark results (#28): MRR 0.506 → 0.956, zero fail rate,
statistically significant over pure semantic (p<0.05).

Closes #33

## Key Design Decisions

- **k=10** for RRF (per benchmark sweep)
- **In-memory** embedding index (~20KB per tenant at 13 artifacts × 384
dims)
- **Graceful degradation**: embedder init failure, embedding build
failure, or query-time embed failure all fall back to FTS5-OR only
- **Model**: `Xenova/gte-small` (~67MB first download, ~200ms subsequent
loads, cached in `~/.cache/huggingface/`)

## New Files (8)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/storage/fts5-preprocessor.ts` | Stop word removal + OR query
builder |
| `src/storage/embedder.ts` | HuggingFace transformer wrapper with
Result return |
| `src/storage/embedding-index.ts` | In-memory Map\<slug, Float32Array\>
with cosine search |
| `src/storage/rrf.ts` | Reciprocal Rank Fusion |
| `test/unit/storage/fts5-preprocessor.test.ts` | 8 tests |
| `test/unit/storage/embedder.test.ts` | 5 tests (incl. model download)
|
| `test/unit/storage/embedding-index.test.ts` | 7 tests |
| `test/unit/storage/rrf.test.ts` | 6 tests |

## Modified Files (11)

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/storage/interface.ts` | `search()` → `Promise<Result<...>>` |
| `src/storage/sqlite/index.ts` | Hybrid search flow: FTS5-OR → semantic
→ RRF fusion |
| `src/engine/reader.ts` | `search()` → async |
| `src/engine/tenant.ts` | `initEmbedder()` + `buildEmbeddings()` in
build pipeline |
| `src/api/server.ts` | `handleOperation()` → async |
| `src/cli/index.ts` | `initEmbedder()` at 3 TenantManager sites |
| `src/tui/data-source.ts` | await search |
| `bench/search-benchmark.ts` | async search adaptation |
| `test/unit/storage/sqlite.test.ts` | async search tests + degradation
test |
| `test/unit/engine/reader.test.ts` | async search tests |
| `test/e2e/full-pipeline.test.ts` | async search tests |

## Test plan

- [x] `bun test test/unit/storage/fts5-preprocessor.test.ts` — 8 pass
- [x] `bun test test/unit/storage/embedding-index.test.ts` — 7 pass
- [x] `bun test test/unit/storage/rrf.test.ts` — 6 pass
- [x] `bun test test/unit/storage/embedder.test.ts` — cosine + error
tests pass (model download test needs network)
- [x] `bun test test/unit/ test/e2e/` — 297 pass, 0 fail
- [x] `bun run typecheck` — clean
- [x] `bun run lint` — clean
- [ ] Manual smoke test: `bun run dev -- serve --source <kb>:test` +
`curl .../search?q=...`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Paper v48: audit-driven hardening, Exp 12C Wilson CI

v48 (4 targeted additions from 8.5/10 audit):
- Cycle overhead quantified: 6.5% per-cycle, ~30% at max frequency
- DDoS/aggregator saturation: new limitation with 3 interim mitigations
- Convergent evolution: identical-data edge case as Stage 4 target
- TEAT bullet cross-references Priority 2 EWC section

Exp 12C: 20 trials with Wilson CI, 65% pass rate (MINE variance at
validation scale, not bound violation). PARTIAL is the honest result.

commit.message:
refactor(session): simplify WaitIdle to rely on monitor for idle detection

Remove duplicated pane-stability tracking from WaitIdle — the background
Monitor now handles pane-stability detection and writes idle/exited/rate_limited
events to the DB. WaitIdle simply polls the DB for these state transitions.

Default poll interval reduced from 30s to 5s since DB polling is cheap and
the monitor writes events within ~20s of actual completion.

Replaced 1 test with 4 focused tests covering idle, rate_limited, exited,
and timeout paths.

Fix 41 wrong book covers across database

Audited all 800 books against Google Books API metadata.
- 14 books: found correct ISBN, cover now matches

Wrong cover (showing a different book) is worse than no cover.

feat(http-proxy): E1-5 ACIS envelope propagation — WebSocket + gRPC transport parity

Wire ACIS decision envelopes into all primary verdict-audit sites
across WebSocket (12 sites) and gRPC (12 sites) handlers, completing
transport parity with HTTP proxy (6 sites) and stdio relay (4 sites).

Each handler type (tool call, resource read, task request, extension
method) now emits structured AcisDecisionEnvelope on all three verdict
branches (Allow/Deny/RequireApproval) with correct DecisionOrigin
(PolicyEngine for Allow/Deny, ApprovalGate for RequireApproval).

41 total ACIS-wired verdict sites across all transports.

fix: correct Alloy syslog listener attribute from `label` to `labels` (#112)

The loki.source.syslog listener block expects `labels` (map type), not
`label` (string). This typo caused Alloy pods to CrashLoopBackOff with
"unrecognized attribute name" error.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Classify ClockingEndLabel → §14.3 [skip ci]

The `clocking_declaration` grammar production in §14.3 (Syntax 14-1) defines `endclocking [ : clocking_identifier ]` as the optional end label for a clocking block. This test exercises exactly that: a clocking block closed with `endclocking : cb`. The end label is part of the same production — there is no deeper subclause.

commit.message:
feat: add keyword-based supersedence detection in store() path

Implement ContentContradictionDetector that detects explicit migration/
replacement language (migrated from, switched to, replaced with, etc.)
in new content and automatically marks matching existing nodes as
superseded. Enabled via enable_store_supersedence=True config flag
(default False for backward compatibility).

- Add src/prme/organizer/contradiction.py with pattern matching for 10+
  migration/replacement signals and term extraction
- Add enable_store_supersedence config field to PRMEConfig
- Add _check_store_supersedence helper to MemoryEngine.store() path
  (non-fatal: errors are caught and logged, never breaking store())
- Add 31 tests covering signal detection, term extraction, and content
  matching in tests/test_contradiction.py
- All 257 existing tests pass, changing_facts simulation 8/8 checkpoints pass

commit.message:
Add user-defined scheduled tasks

Users can create recurring tasks from the Settings page. Each task has
a name, a natural-language prompt (what Jarvis should do), frequency
(hourly/daily/weekdays/weekly), time, delivery channel (SMS/email),
and enabled toggle.

The per-minute reminders cron now also fires due schedules: it runs the
prompt through Claude with full tool access, then delivers the result.

commit.message:
Redesign UI and fix palette algorithm for brand colour fidelity

Frontend:
- Header title enlarged to text-5xl bold
- Section 1 hex mode: remove min-h constraint that caused dead whitespace
- Section 4: title/description at top like other sections, buttons below,
  JSON preview removed, help text retained

Theme presets (renamed and redefined):
- Lite: clean light canvas, brand colours lead palette
- Dark (was dusk): dark canvas, brand colours vivid on dark bg
- Brand Canvas (was mist): white visual panels, pairs with PPTX template
- Contrast (was nightfall): high-contrast white for accessibility and print

Colour algorithm:
- Palette slots 0-2 now anchored to actual brand/source colours (lightness
  clamped into legibility band, saturation preserves brand character)
- Slots 3-7 remain hue-shifted complementary fills
- RAG status colours updated to Okabe-Ito inspired palette for
  colourblind friendliness: teal-green / amber / vermillion
